findings.title: No CI pipeline configured
findings.description: No CI configuration files found in .github/workflows, .gitlab-ci.yml, or other common locations.
findings.evidence: Scanned repo root; no CI-related files detected.
findings.remediation: Add a minimal GitHub Actions workflow to run tests and linting on every push.

findings.title: Potential secrets in repository
findings.description: Patterns resembling API keys were found in tracked files.
findings.remediation: Move secrets to environment variables or a secret manager, rotate the keys, and remove them from git history.

findings.title: No tests detected
findings.description: No tests/ directory or test_*.py files found.
findings.evidence: Scanned Python files; none matched test naming patterns.
findings.remediation: Add a tests/ directory with at least smoke tests for critical paths.

top_risks: Critical: Secrets likely committed to the repo.
High: No CI pipeline means changes are unverified before deploy.
Medium: No tests increases risk of regressions.
recommended_next_steps: Immediately remove and rotate any committed secrets.
Introduce a minimal CI workflow to run tests and linting.
Add smoke tests for core business flows.
ai_summary.overall_comment: This repo has serious security and reliability risks. Address secrets and CI within the next sprint.
